code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{useNavigate,Link}from'react-router-dom';import{useAuth}from'../context/AuthContext';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Login=()=>{const[email,setEmail]=useState('');const[password,setPassword]=useState('');const{login}=useAuth();const navigate=useNavigate();const handleSubmit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();const success=await login(email,password);if(success){navigate('/');}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"auth-screen",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"auth-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"auth-badge",children:"Welcome back"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"auth-title",children:"Sign in to your account"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"auth-subtitle",children:["Or",' ',/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/register",className:"text-amber-600 font-semibold hover:text-amber-700",children:"create a new account"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{className:"mt-8 space-y-4",onSubmit:handleSubmit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"email",required:true,className:"input-field",placeholder:"Email address",value:email,onChange:e=>setEmail(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"password",required:true,className:"input-field",placeholder:"Password",value:password,onChange:e=>setPassword(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",className:"btn-primary w-full",children:"Sign in"})]})]})});};export default Login;
